summary: Frontend language switching testing completed. Language switcher button works correctly in Dashboard. SuperAdmin login page is properly translated. However, SuperAdmin main dashboard has hardcoded Arabic text that is NOT wrapped with t() function, so it doesn't translate when language is changed to English.

translation_issues.issue: Hardcoded Arabic text not wrapped with t() function
examples: Line 1826: 'لوحة تحكم المالك' should be {t('لوحة تحكم المالك')}

action_items: Wrap all hardcoded Arabic text in SuperAdmin.js main dashboard with t() function for translation support
critical_code_review_comments: SuperAdmin.js login page uses t() function correctly and translates properly
SuperAdmin.js main dashboard (lines 1800+) has many hardcoded Arabic strings that need to be wrapped with t() function
The translation system (useTranslation hook) is working correctly - the issue is just missing t() wrappers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Language switcher component (LanguageSwitcher.js) works correctly. Dashboard.js is properly translated. SuperAdmin.js login page is translated. SuperAdmin.js main dashboard needs t() wrappers added to all Arabic text strings.

language_switcher_button.details: Button appears in Dashboard header with Globe icon, shows current language, dropdown shows all 3 options (Arabic, English, Kurdish)

language_switch_arabic_to_english.details: Clicking English option changes language and reloads page with English translations

numbers_in_english_format.details: Numbers display as 9,000 instead of ٩,٠٠٠ - using en-US locale in currency.js

superadmin_login_translation.details: Login page shows: Owner Dashboard, Email, Password, Secret Key, Login, Create Account - all in English when language is set to English

superadmin_dashboard_translation.details: Main dashboard still shows Arabic text (إجمالي العملاء, العملاء النشطون, etc.) because text is not wrapped with t() function

dashboard_translation.details: All Dashboard elements properly translated: Quick Actions, Statistics, Net Profit, Average Order, Number of Orders, Total Sales, Sales by Payment Method, Recent Orders
